final:
module pipo_shift_register (
    input wire [4:0] data_in,
    input wire clk_inv,
    input wire load,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);

    always @(posedge clk_inv or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 5'b00000;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule
